RULE: Resolved PLAN must exist in Policy Form Crosswalk authoritative QL Plan Code set
PLAN must be non-blank and contain no embedded spaces
No two key rows share the 7-field segmentation tuple
Every factor row resolves to a parent QuikPlxx key row (no orphan factors)
Every generated key resolves at least one factor row (no empty keys)
EFFDATE is a valid YYYYMMDD date that fits D8
CNTL = QL_DURATION//10 zero-padded 2 chars; within populated page range
len(format value to 2 decimals) <= 7; positive <= 9999.99; negative >= -999.99
FAILURE_ACTION: Block affected plan/family; report in overflow_detail_report.csv

RULE: GENDER/UWCLASS/BAND/ISSCNTRY/ISSUEST resolved per VARY flags; no nulls
Mapped values must be in {F M J}/{01 02 03}/{00 NS SM PR ST}
TYPE_CODE in {NN PN TP TX UF NF SL} never produces a factor row
